title: Build Villages DataPack
description: Let's You Build Villages With A Hammer
body:
- [​This Let's You Build Villages By Using The Hammer That Was Added To The World]
- To Craft The Hammer You Will Need, one iron ingot, one stick, and one cobblestone.
- This Should Work In Multiplayer.
  
  **To Use The Hammer Right-Click With It In You're Select Slot. To Select A Village Go To The Gallery And Read The Description Of The Images.**

**That's It For Now See You Next Time Guy's**
